TestCase z6Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_elements1 = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_elements1, t1.elements1, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.elements1 = follow_case_elements1;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check to ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Negate all elements of elements1
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        follow_case.elements1[i] = -follow_case.elements1[i];
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
